meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding for No-Code Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to build professional user onboarding without coding experience. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for faster delivery.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of coding experience requires leveraging high-level abstractions like Antigravity to define business logic and Claude Code to handle implementation. By treating user onboarding as a modular, repeatable component, you can ship professional, high-converting flows in hours rather than weeks, effectively scaling your freelance output.
content.intro:
The client is waiting, the deadline is tight, and your lack of coding experience feels like an insurmountable wall. You know that first impressions are everything in SaaS, yet building a seamless, high-conversion user onboarding flow feels like a task reserved for senior engineers in ivory towers.

But the game has changed. You no longer need to write boilerplate code to build robust, production-grade features. By combining the architectural power of Antigravity with the autonomous execution of Claude Code, you can bridge the gap between 'no-code' and 'pro-developer' today.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Journey
steps.description: Map out the user's path from sign-up to 'Aha!' moment. Focus on brevity and value-first design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a UX architect. Create a structured JSON schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow that collects user name, professional role, and primary goal. Include validation rules for each input.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding schema and validation logic based on the user journey map'

steps.title: Bootstrap the UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, accessible UI components that match your client's brand identity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding wizard component using Tailwind CSS. Include smooth transitions between steps and state management for form inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the React onboarding component with Tailwind styles and form state management'

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the user's progress is saved so they don't lose data if they refresh the browser.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a local storage hook in TypeScript to persist the onboarding form data across page reloads. Provide error handling for storage limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add local storage persistence hook to the existing onboarding flow'

steps.title: Connect Backend Logic
steps.description: Trigger a welcome email or database record update once the onboarding flow is completed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side handler that receives the onboarding payload and updates the user profile in a Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a server-side handler for profile updates and connect to Supabase'

steps.title: Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Run automated smoke tests to ensure the onboarding flow doesn't break under common edge cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of Jest test cases for the onboarding wizard covering empty fields, invalid inputs, and successful completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and execute unit tests for the onboarding component'

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled feature; it makes it easier to port to other client projects later.
Use 'micro-copy' to reduce friction—every field label should explain the 'why' behind the request.
Implement a 'skip' option for power users to prevent churn during the onboarding phase.
Leverage Claude Code to audit your generated code for security vulnerabilities before pushing to production.
Keep your state logic outside the UI components to allow for easier unit testing and debugging.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on analyzing drop-off rates using an analytics tool like PostHog to iterate and improve the flow based on real user data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the 'no-code' label define your limits. You now have the blueprint to build like a senior engineer and deliver enterprise-grade features for your clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
